description: Parameters consumed by the build stage script. Vendor overrides may suppress, replace, or extend these via a vendor-scripts/02-build.params.json in the config repo.

parameterGroups.name: Source Control
parameterGroups.description: Refs that pin exactly what source is checked out for this build. Leave empty to use the defaults defined in adoptium_pipeline_config.json.

parameters.name: VARIANT
parameters.description: Build variant / distribution name (e.g. temurin, dragonwell, corretto, openj9)

parameters.name: SCM_REF
parameters.description: Git tag or branch for the upstream JDK source checkout (e.g. jdk-21.0.12+6_adopt). Empty = repository default branch.

parameters.name: BUILD_REF
parameters.description: Git branch or tag for the build-scripts repository. Empty = default defined in adoptium_pipeline_config.json.

parameters.name: AQA_REF
parameters.description: Git branch or tag for the aqa-tests repository. Empty = default defined in adoptium_pipeline_config.json.

parameterGroups.name: Build Options
parameterGroups.description: Fine-grained overrides for the configure, make, and source-fetch steps. All fields are optional — leave empty to use the defaults from the build configuration.

parameters.name: EXTRA_CONFIGURE_OPTIONS
parameters.description: Extra options appended to the configure invocation (e.g. --with-vendor-name=MyOrg)

parameters.name: EXTRA_MAKE_OPTIONS
parameters.description: Extra options appended to the make invocation (e.g. LOG=debug JOBS=4)

parameters.name: EXTRA_GETSOURCE_OPTIONS
parameters.description: Extra options passed to get_source.sh; overrides defaults from any vendor variables file

parameterGroups.name: Personal Build
parameterGroups.description: Options for developer / personal builds. A personal build skips artifact publishing and test promotion — useful for testing a branch or patch without affecting release pipelines.

parameters.name: PERSONAL_BUILD
parameters.description: Mark as a personal/developer build. Skips artifact publish and test promotion steps.

parameters.name: CUSTOM_DESCRIPTION
parameters.description: Free-text label attached to this build run (e.g. 'testing fix for JDK-1234'). Displayed in the build summary.
